title: Money and Shipwrights
description: Usopp’s attachment to the Going Merry turns the repair verdict into a personal crisis that separates him emotionally from the crew.
scene: Across pages 10, 11, 12, 13, this part follows Usopp, Iceburg, Luffy, Sanji, Zoro. Usopp’s attachment to the Going Merry turns the repair verdict into a personal crisis that separates him emotionally from the crew.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Thus, no one can "repair" your ship.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Just remake the ship from Start!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: There is no two identical ships.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What are you walking talkin? About?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: No!! I don't want a new ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Our ship is going Going Merry!!

summary: Usopp’s attachment to the Going Merry turns the repair verdict into a personal crisis that separates him emotionally from the crew.
